tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Several tests (test_include_files_fallback, test_explicit_filters_take_priority, test_null_for_no_include_files) extract the helper function and actually execute it via node subprocess with mock inputs and verify return values. While some tests are text-based (test_executor_call_sites_updated, test_filter_helper_defined), the majority execute actual code behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests require non-trivial implementation: test_include_files_fallback verifies the helper returns includeFiles.length (1, 2, 5) when explicit filters return null - a stub returning None/null would fail. test_explicit_filters_take_priority checks the function returns specific numeric values. A do-nothing or stub implementation cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction describes two problems (over-sharding and incorrect plan output) and the tests cover both: the helper function tests verify the fallback logic that fixes over-sharding, and the call-site tests verify both executor.mjs (formatPlanOutput) and planner.mjs (buildTopLevelSingleShardAssignments, formatExecutionUnitSummary) are updated.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-structured with clear section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived), descriptive function names (test_include_files_fallback, test_explicit_filters_take_priority), and detailed docstrings explaining what each test verifies.

structured_data_schema.reason: The task involves fixing JavaScript code logic, not producing structured data output like JSON/CSV/API/DB.

no_typos.reason: File paths (scripts/test-planner/executor.mjs, scripts/test-planner/planner.mjs, vitest-args.mjs), function names (countExplicitEntryFilters, buildTopLevelSingleShardAssignments, formatPlanOutput, formatExecutionUnitSummary), and commands are all consistent and correctly spelled.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The instruction names specific functions (buildTopLevelSingleShardAssignments, formatPlanOutput, formatExecutionUnitSummary, countExplicitEntryFilters), specific files (executor.mjs, planner.mjs), and the exact pattern to fix ('countExplicitEntryFilters(unit.args)' should also consider 'unit.includeFiles as a fallback').
